name: Quesadilla Marina
recipeIngredient: 1 regular or whole wheat 6-inch flour tortilla
1/3 cup ripe Italian Roma type tomato, diced, seeded
Droplets of favorite hot pepper sauce to taste
1/2 cup Monterey Jack, or cheese of choice, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Briefly toast the tortilla in a dry 6-inch non-stick skillet for about one minute on each side.
2. Set the tortilla aside. Add olive oil to the pan and heat over moderate heat.
3. Add onions and garlic; saute until crisp tender.
4. Stir in tomatoes, hot sauce, shrimp, cilantro, salt, pepper, and lime juice. Season to taste.
5. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the shrimp mixture. Place the tortilla on top, pressing gently to form an even layer.
6. Cook for one minute more to melt the cheese, then turn the quesadilla onto a warm plate.
7. Cut into wedges and serve immediately, topped with a little guacamole if desired.
Yield: 1 serving
